expected_visible_relationship: The hosted boxmodel tank should visibly differ from the rejected build: one connected cast turret shell should replace pasted turret panels, roadwheel/hub/bogie band should visibly read outside the track slab, and lower hull/track cracks should look materially covered as joined armor.
actual_visible_relationship: User reported no-op churn after v1-15: the visible tank did not materially improve enough to count as a visible delta.
did_not_change: No accepted cloud/Sense evidence shows a visible improvement for the turret-panel relationship.
No accepted cloud/Sense evidence shows a visible improvement for the wheel-band relationship.
No accepted cloud/Sense evidence shows the lower hull/track cracks visually closed as joined armor.
diagnostics_assessment: Source, GLB, manifest, and hosted token checks changed, but those diagnostics contradict the user visual read and cannot prove visual success. The existing Blender visibility diagnostic was stale at v1-13 and cannot validate v1-15.
acceptance_blocker: Requires fresh cloud/Sense verdict for this exact build token before any fixed/changed/ready-for-acceptance claim.
next_allowed_work: Repair the evidence gate and visual-delta measurement before making another geometry tweak.
